CustomField.formula: CASE( TEXT(leaseworks__PBH_Rent_Rate__r.leaseworks__Rate_Basis__c), 'Hourly', leaseworks__PBH_Rent_Rate__r.leaseworks__PBH_Rate__c, 'FH Matrix', leaseworks__PBH_Rent_Rate__r.leaseworks__PBH_Rate__c, 'Cycle', leaseworks__PBH_Rent_Rate__r.leaseworks__PBH_Rate_FC__c, 'FC Matrix', leaseworks__PBH_Rent_Rate__r.leaseworks__PBH_Rate_FC__c, 'Both(FH+FC)', IF( leaseworks__Unit_Type__c == 'FH', leaseworks__PBH_Rent_Rate__r.leaseworks__PBH_Rate__c, leaseworks__PBH_Rent_Rate__r.leaseworks__PBH_Rate_FC__c ), 'Greater(FH/FC)', IF( leaseworks__Unit_Type__c == 'FH', leaseworks__PBH_Rent_Rate__r.leaseworks__PBH_Rate__c, leaseworks__PBH_Rent_Rate__r.leaseworks__PBH_Rate_FC__c ), 0 )
CustomField.label: PBH Rate($)
